title: I wonder are there any Evageeks my age
display_title: I wonder are there any Evageeks my age
wikitext:
[]: I wonder [are there any Evageeks my age?]             Quote Post by Xxx_Generic Name_Xxx » Sat Jul 09, 2016 10:35 pm Are there 12 year Olds who like EVA? I met someone which is in the 6th grade who likes EVA so is a possibility.

[]: Re: I wonder [are there any Evageeks my age?]             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Jul 09, 2016 10:41 pm I first saw the series and joined here when I was 13. That was about ten years ago though. (When did I get so oldddddd??) Also, please try to put enough description in your thread titles so that people can see what the topic is about before opening it. Thanks!

[]: Re: I wonder [are there any Evageeks my age?]             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jul 09, 2016 10:57 pm Ah, good ol' Sachi13. It's like he was a totally different person!

[]: Re: I wonder [are there any Evageeks my age?]             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sat Jul 09, 2016 10:59 pm There's our member called SawItAtAge10 - older now, but has given accounts of how they first saw Eva .

[]: Re: I wonder [are there any Evageeks my age?]             Quote Post by Director Black » Wed Jul 20, 2016 6:40 pm And I thought I was the youngest here. True, I'm not 12, but 4 years apart isn't that bad.

[]: Re: I wonder [are there any Evageeks my age?]             Quote Post by MossKiller » Tue Jul 26, 2016 9:55 am You guys are so lucky, I wish I watched Eva when I was young.

[]: Re: I wonder [are there any Evageeks my age?]             Quote Post by SawItAtAge10 » Thu Jul 28, 2016 12:15 pm pwhodges wrote: There's our member called SawItAtAge10 - older now, but has given accounts of how they first saw Eva .

[]: Re: I wonder [are there any Evageeks my age?]             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Mon Aug 01, 2016 11:10 pm I wish I was 12 when I first saw this. I would have given me 10 extra years to have enjoyed this show (I saw it for the first time when I was 22, now I'm 24)

[]: Re: I wonder [are there any Evageeks my age?]             Quote Post by Intheseaofdirac » Tue Aug 02, 2016 1:09 pm I first saw this series when I was 14. Even though I am MUCH older now, I was a fan of the series at that point. Although, I am much older now, when Cruel Angel's Thesis starts, I am that 14 year old guy, transfixed by a series that changed my life. Spiritually and metaphorically, I am a 14 year old fan of the series still.

[]: Re: I wonder [are there any Evageeks my age?]             Quote Post by Alex108 » Mon Oct 15, 2018 6:10 pm I saw it for the first time when I was 14. I’m 31 now... Needless to say it stuck with me.

[]: Re: I wonder [are there any Evageeks my age?]             Quote Post by TrashAssUser » Sun Oct 21, 2018 9:20 am Xxx_Generic Name_Xxx wrote: Are there 12 year Olds who like EVA? I met someone which is in the 6th grade who likes EVA so is a possibility.

[]: Re: I wonder [are there any Evageeks my age?]             Quote Post by SpaceCowboy35 » Mon Nov 05, 2018 10:13 am I watched when I was 13, so yeah. Just so you know, it only gets better as you get older and can fully grasp some of the things that come with maturity

[]: Re: I wonder [are there any Evageeks my age?]             Quote Post by Jibe » Mon Nov 05, 2018 11:47 am I watched EVA on TV in 1996 when I was 15. I now feel like Intheseaofdirac exactly said when I watch it again, despite the fact I'm now 37. I try not to dive again too often in EVA.

[]: Re: I wonder [are there any Evageeks my age?]             Quote Post by Julius » Tue Nov 06, 2018 11:12 am I watched it first at 15 years old

[]: Re: I wonder [are there any Evageeks my age?]             Quote Post by ZQFMGB » Sat Nov 10, 2018 6:22 am Although my stupid internet paranoia prevents me from telling my age, I can say I started watching Eva at 14. Well, to be more precise, I first saw pics and videos of Eva when I was 12, but the idea of organic robots, which implied lots of blood in battles, along with the whole depression things scared me away, and I only came back to it at 14.
